article_title: Shingles Vaccine Cuts Major Cardiac Events by 46 Percent in Heart Disease Patients, Rivaling the Benefits of Quitting Smoking

content_preview.title: Shingles Vaccine Cuts Major Cardiac Events by 46 Percent in Heart Disease Patients, Rivaling the Benefits of Quitting Smoking
content_preview.summary: A study of nearly 250,000 U.S. adults finds the shingles vaccine dramatically reduces heart attacks, strokes, and deaths in people with existing cardiovascular disease.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

A large retrospective study presented at the American College of Cardiology's Annual Scientific Session (ACC.26) in New Orleans has found that the shingles vaccine is associated with dramatically lower rates of heart attacks, strokes, and deaths among people who already have cardiovascular disease. The findings, [reported by ScienceDaily](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260319044659.htm), show that vaccinated patients experienced a 46 percent reduction in major adverse...

editor_notes.source_verification: ScienceDaily confirmed 46% cardiac reduction, 66% mortality, 246822 patients, ACC.26, mechanism.
